'''Stygium crystals''' were a type of rare [[crystal]]s composed of [[stygium]] that were used to power [[Cloaking device|stealth systems]] for [[starship]]s. The cloaking technology of the ''[[Carrion Spike]]'', the personal [[corvette]] of [[Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin]], ran on stygium crystals.<ref name="Tarkin" /> [[Maul|Darth Maul's]] [[Scimitar|Sith Infiltrator]], the ''[[Scimitar]]'', also utilized them.<ref name="Complete Vehicles">''[[Star Wars Complete Vehicles, New Edition]]''</ref>
